title: Sam
html:
Sam — Yahir's mid-2024 partner who lied to him about something with "Jaden," triggering the April 2024 breakup script. The post-breakup arc spans Yahir's mind for months and eventually escalates to a stalking-order packet in March 2025.

What we know

  • Roommate of Paige — also somewhat best friends with Paige.
  • The breakup trigger (April 27, 2024): Sam lied directly to Yahir's face about something with "Jaden" (sexual encounter); Yahir had explicitly asked her if she'd slept with Jaden and she said no.
  • Yahir's processing: "feel humiliated that I iterated 'I trust you' when you looked me in the eyes and lied." Forgives, then realizes trust shattered, then ends it.
  • Post-breakup phantom (July 6, 2024): "Don't want to admit it bc it feels like I'm succumbing... I still think about Sam, a lot." Posts on Snapchat just to see if Sam viewed it.
  • The escalation (2024 07 mega notebook): "call the cops about the Sam situation" + "Print stalking order, Turn in stalking order" — implies the post-breakup escalated past normal post-breakup territory.
  • March 2025 stalking-order legal action: Yahir obtained legal documentation per the Stalking PACKET doc.
  • Foreshadowed earlier: Jan 4, 2024 late night cry note — Yahir already sensed "things between you and sam probably won't work, and it's because of your want to hide her from you."

The arc (4-stage)

  1. Late 2023 - Early 2024: relationship period, with private doubts about hiding her.
  2. April 2024: the Jaden-lie breakup, scripted carefully.
  3. Summer 2024: phantom-limb phase, Snapchat-as-signal.
  4. 2024-2025: escalation to legal action — the Sam situation goes from breakup → safety territory.

Open questions

  • Last name? Always referred to by first name only.
  • Who is Jaden?
  • What were the actions that prompted the stalking order? (The order suggests Sam's behavior, not Yahir's.)
  • Status of the order today.
